title: The Amethyst Cauldron
description: A 1.18.2 kitchen sink modpack with a fantasy/magic focus
body:
![The Amethyst Cauldron](https://i.imgur.com/1pPcPXW.png)
A Quilt kitchen sink pack with a focus on magic and fantasy mods. In fact, you could call it a kitchen _cauldron_ pack. No, it's not that clever? Oh okay. 😞 But that's why _cauldron_ is in the name. Why is _amethyst_ in the name? Well, several of the mods make heavy use of amethyst. Also it sounds magical and I like the colour purple. The pack is very light on tech mods (with only _Create_ being included) but has quite a few magic mods, including _Botania, Malum, Bewitchment, Spectrum, Origins (with Classes and Medieval Origins), Hex Casting, Arcanus, Archon, Conjuring, Magehand, Mythic Mounts, Spelunker, XP Obelisk, Things, Trinkets,_ and _Waystones_. There are also several mods that add new/improved structures and dungeons, and along with _Oh The Biomes You'll Go_, there's no shortage of exploration to be done. Rounding out the pack are plenty of decoration, QoL, and visual improvement mods. ### [Watch me play the modpack on Twitch!](https://www.twitch.tv/faeldray)

### Additional Mods/Texturepacks Due to copyright reasons, a number of mods and texture packs could not be included in the pack. I've linked to the versions that work with the pack below, feel free to add them if you want. I'd strongly recommend at least adding the **Recommended Mods**. I know it's inconvenient but there's nothing I can do about it. **Recommended Mods:** [Awesome Dungeon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/awesome-dungeon-fabric/files/3959431), [Awesome Dungeon Edition End](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/awesome-dungeon-the-end-fabric/files/3959587), [Awesome Dungeon Edition Nether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/awesome-dungeon-nether-fabric/files/3959521), [Awesome Dungeon Edition Ocean](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/awesome-dungeon-edition-ocean-fabric/files/3999317), [Better Villages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-village-fabric/files/3959337), [Library Ferret](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/library-ferret-fabric/files/3959269) (a library mod required for the Awesome Dungeons and Better Villages mods), [Ecologics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecologics/files/3987875), [Mythic Mounts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mythic-mounts/files/3772875), [Loot Integrations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations/files/3760285), [Storage Labels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/labels/files/4040530) **Optional Mods:** [Better FPS Distance](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance-fabric/files/3768225), [Macaw's Bridges - BYG](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges-oh-the-biomes-youll-go/files/3783332), [Macaw's Roofs - BYG](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs-oh-the-biomes-youll-go/files/3983402) **Resource Packs:** [Better 3D Ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-3d-ores/files/3593620), [Luminous](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/luminous/files/3569361), [Stoneborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stoneborn-dwarven-fantasy-inspired-ui-overhaul/files/3586400), [Stoneborn Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stoneborn-extended/files/3665502), [Stoneborn Gear](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stoneborn-dwarven-fantasy-inspired-gear-overhaul/files/3586420) ### Credits Very special thanks to: -
